title: MCretector
description: MCreator Detector | Detect MCreator mods when you launch your game and print them in your log
body:
## MCretector
This mod will scan the jar files in your mods folder when the game starts. If any of these files contain the "mcreator" or "procedures" folders, the jars'  absolute paths will be printed in the log.

## Why?
Note that this mod does not intend to criticize MCreator or the mods created with it.

But some of these mods may have compatibility and optimization issues. Therefore, the mod aims to help modpack authors easily identify MCreator-made mods to prevent any unforeseen issues in their modpacks.
## Misc
